scripts.predeploy: npm run build && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['web/dist/CNAME', 'web/public/CNAME'].forEach(p => { if (fs.existsSync(p)) fs.unlinkSync(p) }); const cache = 'node_modules/.cache/gh-pages'; if (fs.existsSync(cache)) { try { fs.rmSync(cache, { recursive: true, force: true }); } catch (e) { console.log('Cache busy, skipping clean'); } }"
